import pytest
from source import filter_expensive_items

def test_filter_expensive_items_string_price():
    items = [
        {"name": "A", "price": 100},
        {"name": "B", "price": "200"},
        {"name": "C", "price": 150}
    ]
    threshold = 150
    result = filter_expensive_items(items, threshold)
    expected = [{"name": "B", "price": "200"}]
    assert result == expected, (
        f"Expected items with price > {threshold} to be {expected}, "
        f"but got {result}"
    )
